opening_thought: Cold stone. Blue light that does not flicker. My breath sounds too loud.

thoughts.lesson_3_cavern: Rest. Even the crystal stops humming when you stop fighting the dark.
thoughts.cavern_crystal_musings: Light trapped in mineral. Patient. Unhurried.
thoughts.cavern_clue_musings: Scratched into the pillar: REST. The cavern agrees.

cavern_clue_found.title: Etched Pillar
cavern_clue_found.body: Four letters carved in stone: REST.

lesson_3_cavern.title: Lesson — Rest
lesson_3_cavern.body: The stone chest opened to REST. The wardrobe in the bedroom may yield now.

cavern_crystal.title: Crystal Cluster
cavern_crystal.body: Faceted blue shards catching light from nowhere. They pulse like slow breathing.

cavern_chest.title: Stone Chest
cavern_chest.body: Heavy lid, letter lock. The cavern is quiet until you solve it.
